_comment: Trust anchors are pinned by the operator running the verifier — the implementer being checked never supplies them (ADR-010). Keys are matched by issuer NAMESPACE (grant.iss). Today the issuer namespace is founder-operated; the future change is only WHERE it resolves and WHO governs this file, not the verifier.

https://interim-fiduciary.kilbowieconsul.public_key_pem:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
<issuer status-list + issuance key>
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
https://interim-fiduciary.kilbowieconsul.custodian: founder-operated (interim) — moves to a rights-holder fiduciary; see ADR-010

urn:h2a:subject:jane-actor-001.public_key_pem:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
<subject consent key, as enrolled>
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----

bridle.public_key_pem:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
<Bridle evidence-signing key — the party being checked>
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
